name: Inbound Carrier Sales
description: Acme Logistics carrier sales: FMCSA vet, load match, 3-round negotiation, mock transfer.

agent.name: Riley
agent.kind_note: HappyRobot's pre-built Voice Agent template uses the OUTBOUND voice agent (event 0192e5dc-090a-7f57-87a0-76308ed6ef28) paired with a Predefined Webhook trigger — that's the pattern the editor's 'Web Call' Test button is designed for. HR replaces the actual dial-out with a browser audio session at test time, so the agent gets a real two-way audio stream even though the trigger is technically outbound. Using the INBOUND voice agent (0192e5dc-08df-78bf-a549-f43c6bf9f087) with a Predefined Webhook makes the call go silent (agent receives no audio path); using INBOUND with the Inbound Phone trigger (0192a20c-...) requires the org's outbound trunk on the assigned number and hits dispatch-rule conflicts on first publish that need HR support to clear. Outbound Voice Agent + Predefined Webhook is the only fully-programmatic path that works end-to-end for the web-call demo.
agent.initial_message: Hi, thanks for calling Acme Logistics carrier sales — this is Riley. What lane are you running today?

version_history.result: Agent ran but had no transcriber; user couldn't be heard. Added Deepgram Nova 3 + denoised + keyterms in v3. Web-call test fired but audio path wasn't fully wired (TTS reached browser inconsistently).

version_history.phase: Inbound Voice Agent + Inbound Phone trigger (Onboarding number)
version_history.result: Hit 'Dispatch rules conflict for numbers +16282142490' (HTTP 500) on publish. Even after unpublishing every visible workflow that touched the number, the platform refused to release the dispatch claim — HR's own error: 'please contact support'. Cannot unblock programmatically. Workflow deleted.
Same agent type as the first attempt; Web Call test connected but Riley was silent end-to-end.

version_history.phase: CURRENT — Outbound Voice Agent + Predefined Webhook
version_history.result: Matches HappyRobot's own Voice Agent template structure. Outbound trunk on the Onboarding number provides the audio path; HR's Web Call Test substitutes a browser session for the dial-out. Riley speaks, hears, and runs the full tool flow.
